title: Disconnected Readiness Scanner Config
description: Configuration for the disconnected readiness scanner. Used only by central config (config/config.yaml).

registries.description: Approved internal container registries. Images from these registries are treated as safe. Typically only used in central config.

known_mirrors.description: Known-safe packages and mirrors for Python dependency validation.

bundled_packages.description: Python packages guaranteed available in internal mirrors.

exceptions.description: Exception rules that downgrade matching blocker findings to info severity.

rule.description: Rule name, comma-separated list, or '*' for all rules.

path.description: Glob pattern matched against finding file path.

paths.description: List of glob patterns — matches if ANY pattern matches.

image.description: Glob pattern matched against finding image ref.

repo.description: Repository name filter (matches basename or org/repo form). Only allowed in central config.

reference.description: Tracking URL (GitHub Issue or Jira ticket).
